/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_fileservice.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_fileservice.dir/test_fileservice_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_fileservice.dir/tests/TestFileService.cpp.o -o test_fileservice  /usr/lib64/libQt6Test.so.6.10.2 libcore.a /usr/lib64/libQt6Concurrent.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
